programme.title: E16 - Semolina Cakes
programme.desc: This week, Leila Albert welcomes Rosine Binder from Alsace who loves her region, into her kitchen. She concocts a traditional recipe that she inherited from her mother: griesknepfle, or semolina cakes, and a savoury gratin with tomato sauce.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: For Cinco de Mayo celebrations, the contestants prepare shareable dishes inspired by Mexican cuisine. On the menu: colorful pinatas, assorted peppers, and spicy dishes.

programme.title: E18 - Berry, The Heart's Choice
programme.desc: Just two hours from Paris, the Berry is a discreet and little-known land of rural charm and tranquil landscapes. Vast plains, dense forests and peaceful rivers form a simple, authentic picture, far from the hustle and bustle of the big cities, perfect for a revitalising getaway...

programme.title: E13 - Jean Boucault And Johnny Rasse/Plant Memory/Albertas Gardens
programme.desc: Contents: Jean Boucault and Johnny Rasse, bird singers; plant memory; Albertas gardens; Don't panic with Charlotte.

programme.title: E8 - Clemence D'ennery/Juliette Clovis/Rabanne/Marion Mezenge
programme.desc: Clemence d'Ennery unveils her collection of Asian works in a Paris hotel. Using porcelain petals, Juliette Clovis opens up a luminous, dreamlike world. At Rabanne, we push the boundaries of women's dressing with bold materials. Immerse yourself in the studio of artist Marion Mezenge.

programme.title: E1 - La Traviata
programme.desc: A free woman, forbidden love, social exclusion... ''La Traviata'' by Giuseppe Verdi was created in 1853. Extracts from the opera performed in 2020 at the Bordeaux Grand Theatre, under the musical direction of Paul Daniel.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The 51 Percent
programme.desc: The 51 Percent is revolving around women and their role in the world. programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.desc: People and Profit presents top business stories, analyses latest trends and explains what and how impact business operations. Find out what the business prospects are, how business and economic situation affect each and everyone.

programme.title: E1012 - Student of the Jeer / Bean Dreams
programme.desc: Hoping to change her reputation at school, Stella tries to prove that she's not the teachers' pet. // Lori explores a potential career path after her boss suggests she has a strong future within the Burnt Bean organization.

programme.title: E322 - Exchange Student Driver / The Kreepy Krab
programme.desc: Mrs. Puff sends SpongeBob far away to a driving school in Klopnod. // Slappy brings his macabre sensibilities to the Krusty Krab when he's hired there as a server.

programme.title: Tricky Pictures
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts think they are on the trail of a giant bird until they realise it is a visual illusion.

programme.title: Trip to Serbia
programme.desc: Milo is thrilled to find a four-leaf clover and shows it to Alim, who eats it! Upset, Zoe and Milo follow Alim to Serbia, where Nevana invites them to a party with sports. They learn that Serbia has other lucky charms beyond the four-leaf clover.

programme.title: Trip to Iran
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo offer Alim a snack, but when he refuses, they eat it themselves. Alim protests-he was just being polite! To explain, Alim takes them to Iran to meet Aydin during Nowruz, where they learn about Ta'arof, the custom of refusing three times before accepting.

programme.title: Justice
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, safety's a little shaky. So is justice! It's ‘Sheriff' Howler's job to hunt down outlaws and bring them before the judge. But the methods he uses are a trifle different from what we're used to today!

programme.title: Multiple applications of Magnets
programme.desc: How did people know where they were heading before GPS? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of magnetism. Have hands-on fun by constructing your own compass, and get to know An Wang, a computer engineer who revolutionised magnetic core memory.

programme.title: Lights, Camera, Invasion
programme.desc: When the Kemii realize that humans don't fear actors playing aliens, they prepare to shoot a fake movie in Cucurtown starring the leader of the actual invasion team.

programme.title: Shoes That Grow
programme.desc: Host Alie Ward presents a grill that cooks using the sun, a smartphone steadycam, expandable shoes that grow along with a child's foot and a phone attachment to check skin for sun damage.

programme.title: Murky Waters
programme.desc: An invasive species of carp are chasing away all the local fish! Will the MeteoHeroes be able to stop this oversized pest and save the Australian habitat from the invasive carp?

programme.title: Heat and Energy
programme.desc: What's the difference between convection and conduction? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of energy. Have hands-on fun by heating up a water balloon, and get to know James Prescott Joule, a physicist, who discovered the mechanical force of heat.

programme.title: Trip to China
programme.desc: Zoe is writing a card to a friend but is afraid of making spelling mistakes. Is there a country in this world with no spelling rules at all? To find out, our friends travel to China, where people don't use letters but ideograms.

programme.title: Heart Attach
programme.desc: Kaylyn and Alicia struggle to find a new name for the company. Noodles' love detection device disrupts the group's harmony and must ultimately get destroyed.

programme.title: Eye Gunk
programme.desc: In this episode, the doctors put eye boogers under the microscope and show you how to make edible eye gunk!

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: When a deadly secret resurfaces, five friends are stalked by a vengeful killer.

programme.title: E10 - Rekindling
programme.desc: Amidst the effervescence of Lucas's wedding day, Tess plays with fire as she uses Jake's undercover investigation to get close to the man she holds responsible for her mother's death. In this epic finale, Tess must challenge everything she thought she knew about her past to finally learn the truth about the fire that killed her mother and separated her from Lucas. Meanwhile, after spontaneously reaching out to her estranged mother in 209, Sunny continues to push boundaries in an attempt to convince herself she is cured, first sleeping with Kye, and then inviting the wolf to her door in the form of her mother – with unexpected consequences.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: The conspiracy is revealed; Hana, Brody and Delaney work together to deliver justice.

programme.title: E12 - Without Fear Or Favor
programme.desc: Danny joins forces with British investigator Christopher Granger (Jake Weber) to pursue a deadly international fugitive, and Erin faces pressure from her boss.

programme.title: E1 - Enter Sandman
programme.desc: In the series, Gibbs starts his career as a newly minted special agent at the fledgling NCIS Camp Pendleton office where he forges his place on a gritty, ragtag team led by NCIS legend Mike Franks.

programme.title: E14 - National Finals 4 (Part 2)
programme.desc: The National Finals conclude in Las Vegas as the remaining ninjas compete in Stage 3 and 4 and a $1 million winner is crowned as the next American Ninja Warrior.

programme.title: E13 - Murder Six Across
programme.desc: The brilliant yet unconventional attorney-turned-consultant ELSBETH returns for a third season with fresh cases, new characters and unexpected challenges for her and the 11th Precinct, led by her boss, Captain C.W. Wagner.

programme.desc: Rick discovers the story of Italian food in Glasgow, as well as the best chocolate he's ever had, made by an ex-car engineer. He makes profiteroles and a Stein family favourite, osso buco.

programme.desc: Jason's Dubai journey concludes with a bunch of fresh herby dishes that are inspired by the region and include a tangy tabouleh and a lobster sashimi with frozen herb snow.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Scent Of The Wind' Week 8
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.desc: Nobunaga hands over the clan to his son Nobutada (Koseki Yuta) and begins building a grand castle in Azuchi with his sights set on unifying the realm. Hideyoshi joins Shibata Katsuie (Yamaguchi Makiya)'s campaign against the Uesugi, but clashes with him over strategy. Meanwhile, Chika falls under suspicion of secret dealings with another warlord. Seeking the truth, Koichiro goes to a village she has been visiting, where he uncovers the painful past she has long kept hidden.

programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: E8 - No Guts, No Glory
programme.desc: In the season finale, survival expert Bear Grylls selects the winner of $500,000 after a relentless journey to New Zealand’s West Coast --‐ a wet, rainforest amidst torrential downpour where only one team will “Get Out Alive”.

programme.title: E6 - Western Australia: More Than Meets The Eye
programme.desc: Sara goes to Yawuru conservation park to try and catch some mud crabs with cultural guide Bart, who is originally from Broome.

programme.title: E8 - No Guts, No Glory
programme.desc: In the season finale, survival expert Bear Grylls selects the winner of $500,000 after a relentless journey to New Zealand’s West Coast --‐ a wet, rainforest amidst torrential downpour where only one team will “Get Out Alive”.

programme.title: E6 - Bayou Meets Land
programme.desc: It's the final day at Duck Camp for Jean-Paul and the guys. They finish up their trip with a morning of hunting followed by an afternoon filled with crawfish and catfish. The trip ends on dry land and the crew reflects on what makes the duck camp so special.

programme.title: E7 - Reptile Rampage
programme.desc: Billy wrestles abandoned crocs, snakes and lizards out of a suburban home, then teams up with trapper Mike to remove some prickly porcupine squatters from a cottage.

programme.title: E5 - Vision Quest
programme.desc: Sonya suffers from a rare degenerative eye disease and is almost completely blind, but that doesn’t stop her from braving the wild alongside Bear Grylls to rediscover her love for the outdoors. Sonya’s spiritual approach to life enlightens bear, and her sense of adventure inspires all.

programme.title: My Lucky Star
programme.desc: Yip has had bad luck ever since her teenage days. She decides to seek help from famous Feng Shui expert Lai, who discovers that her bad luck is causd by his rival...

programme.title: Lucky Stars Go Places
programme.desc: The lucky stars reunite again. Having the new members joined in, they are playful and frolicsome as usual. This time, their mission is to investigate a case of international ammunition trade that involves two gangs. One is the Japanese underworld society that holds many stolen diamonds, and another one is the mysterious terrorists who own an enormous amount of ammunition. Let's see how the lucky stars overcome the danger and problem.

programme.title: My Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Two Hong-Kong cops are sent to Tokyo to catch an ex-cop who stole a large amount of money in diamonds. After one is captured by the Ninja-gang protecting the rogue cop, the other one gets his old Orphanage gang, dubbed the 'Five Lucky Stars,' to help him. They don't like this much, but they do it...

programme.title: The Duel
programme.desc: The story is set in the Ming dynasty. 'Holy Sword' requests a fight with secret agent 009's friend 'God of Sword' to decide the world's best swordsman. During the contest on the roof of the Forbidden City, 009 realises that 'Holy Sword' has sent a double to fight in his place, while he plans to assassinate the emperor. 'Holy Sword' finds himself surrounded by thousands of palace guards but is rescued by 'God of Sword', who wants to complete their championship...

programme.title: Lucky Stars Go Places
programme.desc: The lucky stars reunite again. Having the new members joined in, they are playful and frolicsome as usual. Let's see how the lucky stars overcome the danger and problem.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In China and America
programme.desc: Wong Fei-hung, Clubfoot and 13th Aunt cross the Pacific Ocean to America to visit 'Bucktooth' So. While traveling through the wilderness, they pick up a cowboy named Billy...

programme.title: Gen-X Cops
programme.desc: To fight against the new era criminals, Inspector Chan struggles for picking up a group of brand new cadets to become his new team called the 'Gen-X-Cops'...

programme.title: Ghost Office
programme.desc: 'Ghost Invasion'- Tung, who has a simple and pure mind and just started his new job, is quickly attracted by his cool but sexy boss – Sam. At the same time, he meets with his secondary schoolmate in the company – Mick. Mick always talks about women with Tung, he even sets a goal of ‘counting on Sam'. Later, Tung always meets Sam because of overtime work. Sam always changes the style and image when she comes out from washroom at night, which she turns to be seducing, charming and totally different from the one at daytime...'A Horny Ghost'- The boss of a pornographic films dubbing company is a horny man, he is accidentally killed because of a sexual harassment. However, his colleagues are still being sexually harassed by him even he is a ghost now...'The Queen of Gossip'- Amanda, who is the queen of gossip, is noisy and like to exaggerate everything. Even her friends can never escape from her, any good news of her friends will be violated and changed to a bad news. The stranges

programme.title: The Duel
programme.desc: The story is set in the Ming dynasty. 'Holy Sword' requests a fight with secret agent 009's friend 'God of Sword' to decide the world's best swordsman. During the contest on the roof of the Forbidden City, 009 realises that 'Holy Sword' has sent a double to fight in his place, while he plans to assassinate the emperor. 'Holy Sword' finds himself surrounded by thousands of palace guards but is rescued by 'God of Sword', who wants to complete their championship...

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E10 - Mindful Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E2 - Cody Is a Good Brother & a Good Friend
programme.desc: Join Cody as he learns how to be a good brother & a good friend! In a heartwarming moment, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother. After some initial nerves, he spends a special day with his mama & her baby bump. Then, the big day arrives as the family brings his new sister, Kendi, home! Watch Cody take on his new role, helping Kendi get to sleep & learning to play new games together like bouncing a balloon.

programme.title: E2 - Nina's Adventures with Friends
programme.desc: Join Nina on some amazing adventures with her friends! When Nina challenges her school friends to a game of soccer, she imagines herself as a true soccer star playing in a giant stadium at the World Cup! Then, she visits Grandpa's farm where she proves to be an ace tractor driver who never leaves her friends behind. From learning to share a new firetruck to going on an epic chase to get back a lost surprise egg, it's always an adventure with Nina!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Welcome for the New Magic Pets!
programme.desc: Get ready to welcome some new Magic Pets with Mila & Morphle! The adventure begins when they meet Shrubcub, a pet whose power is to make plants grow, causing a huge flowery jungle to bloom in Pet Port! Then, they meet Slushyseal, who can change items into juice pops, but the friends have to stop him when he starts turning all the trees & flowers into frozen treats! From a pet that swaps bodies to one that hypnotizes animals, it's a day full of new & magical friends!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Digley, Dazey & the crew for a big day of rescues & learning! When the barn at Old MacDonald's Farm catches fire, the crew uses quick thinking to extinguish the flames. Then, a trip to the mountains goes wrong when an avalanche traps them in a tunnel, & they must find a clever way to escape! The rescues continue as Digley faces his fear of heights to restore a broken clock & the friends work together to save Scout after she falls down a hole during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: E4 - A Fun Day of Games & Construction
programme.desc: Get ready for playground games & construction fun! First, the crew has to build a crazy golf course! After they finish, they decide to try it out, but something goes wrong every time! Then, at the beach, Digley & Dazey challenge each other to a sandcastle competition. They each build castles that get bigger & sillier, & after some bickering, they decide to build one giant castle together! Plus, learn the alphabet & sing 'If You're Happy & You Know It'!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Test of Skill & Teamwork!
programme.desc: Gecko & the Mechanicals face a big test of skill & teamwork! First, the Mechs are in Garage School when a real emergency comes in. In a role reversal, they must fix Fiona the Firetruck's starter motor while Gecko instructs them! Then, when Blue crashes during a flying race, Gecko must show his skill to repair him. The day ends with a big American football game where Gecko comes up with a clever strategy & a creative fix to help his team win!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Fun Home Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Join JJ for some fun learning adventures at home! First, TomTom leads his lab assistants JJ & YoYo in some amazing science experiments, from making slime to building an erupting volcano! Then, it's time to head to the kitchen, where YoYo teaches JJ how to make the perfect peanut butter & jelly sandwich. The at-home fun continues as the kids discover a cassette player & record all the cool sounds they hear around the house!

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Big Pretend Play Dance Party!
programme.desc: Use your imagination at JJ's big pretend play dance party! Join Cody, Nina & Bella as they pretend to explore all sorts of fun places, from outer space to the bottom of the ocean. The fun continues as everyone learns how to do the robot dance to a beep-boop beat! Then, get into your pajamas for a slumber party where you can jump, wiggle & shuffle. With fun exercise moves & graceful ballet steps, it's a dance party where you can be anything you want!

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. programme.title: Om Jai Jagdish
programme.desc: Three brothers, struggling with personal issues, must unite to save their ancestral home from auction. Their journey brings laughter, tears, and the rediscovery of family bonds. Release Year: 2002 Director: Anupam Kher

E17 - The Sharing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels bake a pie and learn how to share by dividing things between them

programme.title: E21 - Splash Dash
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: E11 - Chilli Peppers
programme.desc: It's the bagpipe playing Chilli Peppers performing their song 'We're Chilli When It's Hot'

programme.title: E110 - Rain
programme.desc: A cloud appears in Teletubbyland and it rains. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po watch the flowers bloom. Another cloud appears and it rains pink, Tubby Custard!

programme.title: E20 - Driving
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: E16 - Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: E40 - The Wedding Badge
programme.desc: King Tiger has met his perfect partner and he is getting married. It's going to be a royal wedding!! The squirrels are to be special Guests of Honour, but who is King Tiger marrying!?

programme.title: E17 - The Sharing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels bake a pie and learn how to share by dividing things between them

programme.title: E21 - Splash Dash
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: E11 - Chilli Peppers
programme.desc: It's the bagpipe playing Chilli Peppers performing their song 'We're Chilli When It's Hot'

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: E19 - The Laughter Badge
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E12 - Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: E13 - Master Of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: E101 - Bottom Bump
programme.desc: The Teletubbies bottom bounce on The Tubby Bouncy before wiggling their bottoms to a special bottom bump song.

programme.title: E30 - Turtle Boy
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: E32 - Tradies
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: E7 - The Other Big Engine
programme.desc: While working on the Brazilian Railway, Thomas Meets Gustavo, another big blue engine who reminds him of Gordon back home.

programme.title: E9 - Diesel Do Right
programme.desc: After being scolded for making a mistake, Diesel plays a trick on Rebecca to try and get the other engines in trouble.

programme.title: E33 - The Sphinx, Egypt
programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots are on holiday in Egypt where the Grimbots bury the Great Sphinx in sand, leaving only its head showing.

programme.title: E34 - Go Jet Academy: Mudslide
programme.desc: It's a very rainy day at the Go Jet Academy and the Go Jetters are teaching the Cadets some crucial Go Jetter skills.

programme.title: E7 - Runaway Tour
programme.desc: Preston's automated scooter tour of Swoppiton doesn't go as planned. Mojo and Bo must find a way to chase down and scoop up those scooters, and get the tour back on track!

programme.title: E8 - Watch The Birdie
programme.desc: Preston needs Mojo and Bo to pull his big balloon to a place where he can snap a picture of a rare bird. But his balloon gets loose, and Mojo and Bo need to get Preston back on the ground.

programme.title: E22 - Fruit And Veggie Friends Day
programme.desc: Everyone in the supermarket is enjoying Fruit and Veggie Friends Day, where they get to celebrate friendship, but Evil Pea wants to ruin it - and Supertato keeps stopping her.

programme.title: E10 - The Honey Badge
programme.desc: Duggee's made some delicious pancakes, but the clubhouse is out of honey. Time for the bees to get busy!

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E12 - Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: E13 - Master Of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: E29 - The Creek
programme.desc: Bored of the local playground, Dad and the kids go out bushwalking on a journey to their local creek. Cast out of her comfort zone, Bluey's eyes are opened to the beauty of the natural world.

programme.title: E32 - Bumpy And The Wise Old Wolfhound
programme.desc: Bingo is sick in hospital, so Bluey and Dad sent her a homemade video to lift her spirits. It tells the tale of Barnicus' quest to heal her spotty dog named Bumpy.

programme.title: E7 - Cassowary
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the jungles of Australia in search of a cassowary. Along the way, they meet some wild budgerigars.

E7
programme.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will 'get rid of all your worries and all your concerns.'

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: In the year 1993, K-pop idol Yoo Hyunjae accidentally travels through time to the year 2017. Discovering that he is presumed dead, he begins to investigate what exactly has happened while trying to adjust to life in the 21st century.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will 'get rid of all your worries and all your concerns.'

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.desc: In the heart of Borneo, the jungle stretches as far as the eye can see.

programme.title: E5 - Manipur
programme.desc: Travel to Manipur. We try our hand at Thang Ta, a Manipuri marital art. We experience the love of Radha and Krishna through the Manipuri rendition of the Raasleela.

programme.title: E4 - Malaysia
programme.desc: From one island to another, Huda heads to Langkawi where she experiences first hand how to make virgin coconut oil, a centuries old secret for long luscious locks.

programme.title: E4 - Laws Of The Jungle
programme.desc: This week, the Ranis need to retrieve crucial supplies from a raft that has overturned.

programme.title: E9 - The Secret Of Trimobe
programme.desc: Fara and Koto are two children born with disabilities. Seeing this as a curse, their parents plan to bury them alive to ward it off. Thanks to the kindness of their brothers and sisters, they narrowly escape and embark on a fantastic adventure.

programme.title: E25 - Skateboard Temptation
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: Hep Taxi !:2025-2026
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E3 - Horses of the Sun
programme.desc: Grévy’s zebras population has dropped by 50% in less than 20 years. Environmentalists say that if we aren’t vigilant, they could disappear all together. Lewa Conservancy is at the heart of efforts to protect the species so that they can replenish their numbers

programme.title: E2 - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends including Charlotte, a schnauzer who enjoys bath time with her guinea pig pal Wallace, and a randy ram called Hamish who likes to sneak off to live with a herd of dairy cows instead of his own kind.

programme.title: E2 - Meadow of Horror
programme.desc: It is horror! It is murder! Brutal death as well as exciting fights with an exceptional last-minute rescue. And after seeing it – you will know the creepiest spot is actually the meadow in your neighborhood. With stylistic devices from the horror genre this extraordinary nature documentary takes you on a journey following a well-known hero with six legs, red wings and seven black dots through a seemingly normal meadow – but full of monsters.

programme.title: E3 - Bay of Fundy
programme.desc: Step into the Bay of Fundy’s surging waters. Learn how this east coast ecosystem sustains an abundance of creatures, including hundreds of thousands of seabirds, the world’s fastest predator, and a complex web of invertebrates.

programme.title: E5 - Hollywoods Held Hostage
programme.desc: During the last few weeks of the dry season, the prides stick close to the only available water in the river. But in Luangwa, that proximity spells danger - especially when the scent of a hippo kill compels the Hollywoods to cross the river.

E9 - Janice And Bob
programme.desc: Janice and Bob have spent decades dreaming of leaving city life behind for a peaceful home by the sea. With their daughter Sarah guiding them, they are ready to turn their coastal dreams into reality.

programme.title: E12 - Collard Green Dumplings & Apple Pie Potstickers
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares two dishes inspired by Chinese wontons: an all-American dish made with apple wontons and milk jam; and a collard green dumpling influenced by Southern cuisine.

programme.title: A Nurse To Die For
programme.desc: A father hires a live-in nurse to help care for his sick daughter, however, as she suffers a series of setbacks, he starts to wonder if the nurse might actually be the one keeping her sick.

programme.title: E8 - Squid Ink Pasta
programme.desc: Rachael makes her version of squid ink pasta, prepared with fresh, local calamari, and served on a bed of 'tuxedo pasta.'

programme.title: E12 - Collard Green Dumplings & Apple Pie Potstickers
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares two dishes inspired by Chinese wontons: an all-American dish made with apple wontons and milk jam; and a collard green dumpling influenced by Southern cuisine.

programme.title: E6 - A Diff-Occult Deal
programme.desc: After backing out of a deal that was too good to be true, Rebecca, Kristy and Roy are $10,000 down and desperate for a win to keep their crews working. They decide to roll the dice on a townhouse.

programme.title: E9 - Janice And Bob
programme.desc: Janice and Bob have spent decades dreaming of leaving city life behind for a peaceful home by the sea. With their daughter Sarah guiding them, they are ready to turn their coastal dreams into reality.

programme.title: E4 - 楊迪探班伊芙硬控I人一家
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E7 - 詩禮傳家
programme.desc: 運用了經常出現在電影中的特效技術來拍攝，讓觀眾從不同的角度觀看，像置身於拍攝現場一樣；除了有課本上的詩詞內容外，還融入國風體育運動、美術繪畫、音樂表演等內容，利用豐富有趣的環節形式激發青少年學習傳統文化的熱情。

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: 以美食為介質的全新文化訪談類節目，每集邀請文化名人、名廚大師、外籍帥哥、直播網紅和民間饕客一同做客飯局，在品嚐民間美味的同時，分享人生故事。

programme.title: E4 - 楊迪探班伊芙硬控I人一家
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E474
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. Blending 'high culture with popular culture,' the program explores both tangible artifacts and intangible cultural heritage. It tackles major cultural topics with expansive perspectives, interpreting everyday cultural phenomena.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. programme.title: À l'affiche
programme.desc: Comment les cinéastes, les romanciers, les artistes racontent-ils le monde ? France 24 part à la rencontre d'une culture engagée dans son temps.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: En tête à tête
programme.desc: Des entretiens en tête-à-tête sans concessions avec des dirigeants, des personnalités ou encore des voix alternatives. Les rencontres sont variées.

programme.title: Le journal - L'invité au coeur de l'info[Live]
programme.desc: Une interview au format long avec une personnalité influente du monde politique, culturel, scientifique ou humanitaire, offrant une plongée approfondie au cœur de l'actualité internationale. À travers ses analyses et son expérience, elle apporte un éclairage unique sur les grands enjeux de notre époque.

programme.title: L'essentiel : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: L'essentiel de l'actualité : un grand journal couvrant politique, économie et sport, enrichi de décryptages clairs et d'analyses approfondies des événements majeurs. Un rendez-vous pour s'informer efficacement et mieux comprendre le monde d'aujourd'hui.

programme.title: Le journal - L'invité au coeur de l'info[Live]
programme.desc: Une interview au format long avec une personnalité influente du monde politique, culturel, scientifique ou humanitaire, offrant une plongée approfondie au cœur de l'actualité internationale. À travers ses analyses et son expérience, elle apporte un éclairage unique sur les grands enjeux de notre époque.

programme.title: L'essentiel : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: L'essentiel de l'actualité : un grand journal couvrant politique, économie et sport, enrichi de décryptages clairs et d'analyses approfondies des événements majeurs. Un rendez-vous pour s'informer efficacement et mieux comprendre le monde d'aujourd'hui.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: The Case - Continuous Homicide
programme.desc: One night in Hong Kong, a clip of self-immolation began to go viral on the Internet. Before she died, the female deceased muttered words like she had hit an evil spirit. Then she picked up a lighter and lit it. Her whole body was on fire, and she screamed in pain. All the environmental evidence points to the teacher assisting others to commit suicide. The only thing is that he refused to admit murder, saying that he lost his memory...

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: Shenzhen Intangible Cultural Heritage
programme.desc: The program explores the historical evolution, unique legends, and cultural transmission stories of each heritage item, presenting them in accessible and engaging formats that resonate with the public. By connecting traditional heritage with modern life, the program aims to inspire broader social participation in preservation efforts and promote the spread of excellent traditional Chinese culture.

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: The cutting edge news of SZ. First reporting the news of political ,financial condition and the people's livelihood.

programme.title: The Super Launching
programme.desc: The Super Launching is a geek program in the realm of popular science. Dedicated to showcasing new technologies, achievements, and breakthroughs from around the world, the program focuses on both highlighting existing hot topics and generating new ones, offering the audience a glimpse into the latest popular science and industry developments. Anchored in an innovative city with a global perspective, the Super Launching has established itself as the best platform for global premieres, debuts, and the launch of first stores.

programme.title: Deewana Mastana
programme.desc: Neha, a psychiatrist, is pursued by both Raja, a small-time crook, and Bunnu, a patient. Things take a hilarious turn when the two try to outsmart each other to win Neha's heart. Release Year: 1997 Director: David Dhawan Awards: Filmfare Award- Best Comedian/Comedienne- Johnny Lever
